summary: Persist safe WTS requirement transcript snapshots for the recruiter Workbench stack.
rationale: Task 1 needs historical requirement_review transcript messages to retain the exact recruiter-safe draft snapshot shown at that time, without storing raw runtime draft payloads in the transcript or relying on the current runtime draft projection.
verification: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_react_workbench_cutover_gate.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_agent_workbench_contract.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
CI=1 pnpm --dir apps/web-react exec vitest run src/lib/stream/agentStream.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamReducer.test.ts src/lib/stream/agentStreamView.test.ts --run
uv run ruff check src/seektalent_conversation_agent tests/test_wts_control_plane.py
deletion_targets: requirement_review transcript payloads that embed full runtime-control requirement draft dumps
historical requirement transcript rendering that depends on the current mutable draft projection
risks: Snapshot persistence must stay in the same SQLite transaction as the transcript message.
Snapshots must not include raw draft item values, source spans, amendments, provider payloads, or artifact references.
Idempotent submit replay must not create duplicate snapshot rows.
